errors.inventoryAssetRequired: Default Inventory Asset Account is required.
errors.startingNumber: Starting number must be greater than 0.

welcome.title: Welcome to Inventory Setup
welcome.description: Complete this guided wizard to create your first warehouse and baseline inventory settings.
welcome.warehouseDescription: Define your default warehouse for stock operations.
welcome.settingsDescription: Set cost currency and negative stock policy.

accounting.notEnabledDescription: Inventory operations will track quantities and costs but will not create financial or general-ledger postings.
accounting.enableInstructions: To enable financial impact, activate Accounting from Company Admin → Modules, then complete Accounting setup.
accounting.availableLater: Accounting mode becomes available after Accounting is enabled. You can configure it later from Inventory Settings.
accounting.modeDescription: Choose when stock-related accounting should be recognized.

periodic.title: Periodic
periodic.description: Invoices post Sales and Purchases only. Stock quantities still move, but Inventory and COGS stay out of the ledger until reporting time.

invoiceDriven.title: Invoice-driven
invoiceDriven.description: Operational stock documents remain non-financial. Sales and Purchase Invoices create the accounting effect.

perpetual.title: Perpetual
perpetual.description: Delivery and receipt posting can create real-time Inventory and COGS accounting.

warehouse.title: Default Warehouse
warehouse.description: Create the default warehouse used for opening stock and movements.
warehouse.name: Name

settings.title: Inventory Settings
settings.costCurrencyPlaceholder: Leave blank to use company base currency
settings.accountMappingLater: Account mapping will be configured when Accounting is enabled. You can set Inventory Asset and COGS accounts later from Inventory Settings.

inventoryAssetHelp.perpetual: Required for perpetual inventory. This balance-sheet account holds the value of stock on hand.
inventoryAssetHelp.periodic: Recommended for periodic opening stock and report-time goods inventory. Periodic documents do not post live Inventory or COGS.
inventoryAssetHelp.invoiceDriven: Recommended fallback for invoice-driven stock purchases and inventory recognition.

settings.selectorHelp: Type an account code or name, then press Enter or Alt+Down to search. If no match exists, create a new account from the selector dialog.
settings.cogsHelp: Optional fallback used when sold stock needs a cost posting and the item or category has no COGS account.
settings.cogsSelectorHelp: Use the same selector behavior here: type, press Enter or Alt+Down to search, and create the account if it does not exist.
settings.allowNegativeStockHelp: When enabled, stock can go below zero.
settings.autoGenerateCodesHelp: Generate item codes from a prefix and sequence.

confirm.title: Confirm & Initialize
confirm.description: Review your setup before creating inventory defaults.
confirm.noAccountingWarning: Accounting is not enabled. This initialization will set up Inventory operations only; no financial or general-ledger postings will be created.
confirm.onceNotice: Initialization runs once, then the Inventory dashboard loads with live data.

itemSelector.searchPlaceholder: Search items by name, code or barcode...
itemSelector.noLocalResults: No items found in local cache
itemSelector.createRequired: Code, name, base UoM, and cost currency are required.

warehouseSelector.createRequired: Warehouse code and name are required.

movements.title: Stock Movements
movements.subtitle: Chronological stock movement audit across all items and warehouses
movements.empty: No stock movements match the selected dates.

detail.title: Stock Adjustment
detail.subtitle: Adjust counted inventory quantities with controlled posting
detail.postingNotice: Draft adjustments can be posted after review. Posted adjustments are locked and corrections require a new adjustment.

validation.noChange: No stock quantity change to adjust.
